{# Version switcher rendered when docs are built by sphinx-polyversion. The `revisions`/`branches`/`tags`/`current` variables come from poly.py's `data` factory and are merged into html_context by sphinx_polyversion.load (called from conf.py). On non-polyversion builds the guard skips the block. #} {% if revisions is defined and revisions %} {# Pre-compute the relative path back up to the multi-version output root. `pagename` looks like `index` or `api/autoapi/padne/cli/index`; one extra `..` accounts for the per-version subdir (master/, v0.3/, ...). #} {% set _pv_root = '../' * (pagename.count('/') + 1) %}

Versions

    {% if tags %} {% for rev in tags %}
  • {{ rev.name }}
    • {% endfor %} {% endif %} {% if branches %} {% for rev in branches %}
  • {{ rev.name }} (dev)
    • {% endfor %} {% endif %}
{% endif %}
